payload.tool_calls: [ChatMessageToolCall(id='call_6f4e95faf04b4a64a2795dcc', function=ChatMessageToolCallFunction(name='write_file', arguments='{"content": "import csv\\nimport random\\nfrom datetime import datetime, timedelta\\n\\n# Configuration\\nNUM_ROWS = 100\\nPRODUCTS = [\'Laptop\', \'Mouse\', \'Keyboard\', \'Monitor\', \'Headphones\']\\nPRICE_MIN, PRICE_MAX = 10, 1000\\nQUANTITY_MIN, QUANTITY_MAX = 1, 10\\nYEAR = 2024\\n\\n# Generate random date in 2024\\ndef random_date_2024():\\n    start = datetime(YEAR, 1, 1)\\n    end = datetime(YEAR, 12, 31)\\n    delta = end - start\\n    random_days = random.randint(0, delta.days)\\n    return (start + timedelta(days=random_days)).strftime(\'%Y-%m-%d\')\\n\\n# Generate sales data\\ndef generate_sales_data(rows):\\n    data = []\\n    for _ in range(rows):\\n        data.append({\\n            \'Date\': random_date_2024(),\\n            \'Product\': random.choice(PRODUCTS),\\n            \'Price\': round(random.uniform(PRICE_MIN, PRICE_MAX), 2),\\n            \'Quantity\': random.randint(QUANTITY_MIN, QUANTITY_MAX)\\n        })\\n    return data\\n\\n# Write to CSV\\ndef write_csv(filename, data):\\n    with open(filename, \'w\', newline=\'\') as f:\\n        writer = csv.DictWriter(f, fieldnames=[\'Date\', \'Product\', \'Price\', \'Quantity\'])\\n        writer.writeheader()\\n        writer.writerows(data)\\n\\nif __name__ == \'__main__\':\\n    sales_data = generate_sales_data(NUM_ROWS)\\n    write_csv(\'sales_data.csv\', sales_data)\\n    print(f\\"Generated {NUM_ROWS} rows of sales data in sales_data.csv\\")", "filename": "generator.py"}'), TYPE='function')]
